mapper.select: SELECT wo.id AS workOrderId, wod_c.device_code AS controllerCode, wod_r.device_code AS robotDeviceCode, wo.actual_start_time AS actualStartTime, wo.submit_time AS submitTime, CASE WHEN wo.submit_time IS NOT NULL AND wo.actual_start_time IS NOT NULL THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, wo.actual_start_time, wo.submit_time) ELSE NULL END AS durationSeconds FROM work_order wo INNER JOIN work_order_device wod_c ON wod_c.work_order_id = wo.id AND wod_c.device_type = '2' AND wod_c.device_code = #{controllerCode} LEFT JOIN work_order_device wod_r ON wod_r.work_order_id = wo.id AND wod_r.device_type = '1' WHERE wo.del_flag = 0 AND wo.actual_start_time IS NOT NULL AND wo.status NOT IN ('PENDING', 'STARTED') ORDER BY wo.actual_start_time DESC
